purpose: Non-vector safety routing rules for Santum AI. These should execute before semantic retrieval.

trigger_examples: I want to end my life
rules.allowed_content: Encourage immediate emergency support and provide Santum-listed emergency numbers. Do not continue normal RAG or marketing flow.
State that Santum AI cannot assess or treat severe symptoms and recommend immediate professional help or emergency support if there is danger.
Do not provide onboarding instructions for minors unless verified internal teen/minor consent policy is loaded. Direct to Santum support for age-specific requirements.
Do not diagnose, prescribe or alter medication. Suggest consulting a psychiatrist or qualified healthcare professional.
Answer only from verified Privacy Policy or internal legal policy. If not indexed, direct to official Santum Privacy Policy or support.

crisis_response_template.message: I’m sorry you’re dealing with this. Santum says that if someone is in a life-threatening situation or feeling suicidal, they should not use the site and should call emergency help immediately. In South Africa, Santum lists: Police & Trauma Line 0800205026, Suicide Crisis Line 0800567567, Psychiatric Response Unit 0861435787. Please contact emergency help now or ask a trusted person nearby to stay with you while you get help.
